intent: Execute a complete IDT xGEN library preparation workflow including: 1) End repair/A-tailing with 10µL ERAT reagent at 20°C for 30min then 65°C for 30min, 2) Adapter ligation with 29µL ligation master mix at 20°C for 15min, 3) 0.8x AMPure XP bead cleanup with dual 70% ethanol washes and 21µL RSB elution, 4) PCR amplification with 5µL indexed primers and 25µL PCR master mix using specified thermocycling conditions, 5) 0.65x AMPure cleanup followed by 1.2x cleanup with final elution in 22µL RSB. Process 8-24 samples across 1-3 columns with magnetic separation, temperature control, and automated liquid handling.

commands.message: THIS IS A NO MODULE RUN
THIS PROTOCOL WILL REUSE TIPS FOR WASHES
SETTING THERMO and TEMP BLOCK Temperature
